query:
SELECT 'nightlyAgendaEmails' as automation, status, triggerKind, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(sentAt) as last_sent, MAX(forDate) as last_forDate
  FROM nightlyAgendaEmails GROUP BY status, triggerKind ORDER BY last_sent DESC LIMIT 30;
